top_signals.title: US Stocks Rise as Indexes on Track for Best Quarter Since 2020
top_signals.summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes zeroed in on their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data.

top_signals.title: Business use of stablecoins set for growth surge: Cybrid report
top_signals.summary: The majority of businesses surveyed are likely to use stablecoins within the next 12 months, while regulatory clarity remained the biggest barrier to wider adoption.
